props.ChoiceText: The church chest opened before you, and piety suddenly had columns, shortages, and explanations attached to it.
props.ChoiceBio: Auditing the treasury taught you that holy institutions count very worldly things.

0.TransitionText: Because auditing the treasury taught you that holy institutions count very worldly things, church office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Prelate, but you may remain on your current path instead.
